title: Run smoke tests and validate core functionality
description:
Validate that all components are working before running on real data.

## Test Checklist

- [ ] YAML syntax validation passes
- [ ] MCP tool plexus_evaluation_compare is registered
- [ ] CLI command plexus procedure optimize exists and shows help
- [ ] Identifier resolution works for name/key/ID/externalID
- [ ] Procedure YAML loads without errors

## Commands to Run

```bash
# 1. Validate YAML syntax
python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('plexus/procedures/feedback_alignment_optimizer.yaml'))"

# 2. Check CLI help
plexus procedure optimize --help

# 3. Test identifier resolution (dry run, quick on test scorecard)
plexus procedure optimize -s <scorecard> -c <score> --days 7 --dry-run
```

## Success Criteria

All smoke tests pass without errors.

comments.text:
## Smoke Test Results

✅ **Test 1: YAML Syntax** - PASSED
- File: plexus/procedures/feedback_alignment_optimizer.yaml
- Result: Valid YAML, no syntax errors

✅ **Test 2: CLI Command** - PASSED  
- Command: plexus procedure optimize --help
- Result: Command exists, shows proper help text

✅ **Test 3: MCP Tool Registration** - PASSED
- Tool: plexus_evaluation_compare
- Location: MCP/tools/evaluation/evaluation_comparison.py
- Registered in: MCP/server.py (lines 17, 114)

## Next: Find Test Score
